feature_stressed: open markers fused with a same-color solid fit curve through every point. §3b per-column thin-run subtraction with paired-edge preservation is the test.
chart_title: Synthetic #9 — open circles fused with same-color fit line
subtraction_test: A naive `mask = (gray < 120) & color_match` will fuse every marker with the fit line — the fit line passes through the marker centroid and connects the top arc to the bottom arc. After §3b column-wise thin-run subtraction with paired-edge preservation, the markers should survive as ring-shaped CCs and the fit line should be removed.
